labels.panelSubtitle: AI answers first · escalates to a human if it can't help
labels.notResolvedButton: Not resolved, talk to a human
labels.budgetExhaustedNote: AI support is busy right now — switched to template replies.
labels.handoffCreatedNote: A human support ticket has been created
labels.handoffFailedNote: Couldn't escalate to a human. Please try again later or email us directly.

fallback.greeting: Hi! I can help with questions about your trial, plans, exporting Jianying drafts, and job troubleshooting.
quickQuestions: How do I export a Jianying draft?

conversation.offlineMessageDefault: No one is online right now. Scan the QR code to add us on WeChat and we'll reply as soon as we can.

messageList.emptyHint: No messages yet. Ask us anything.
